languages.text: "В день Звездного Погребения Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, должна была взойти на небесный престол, дабы забрать усопших к самому Бессмертному в священные чертоги Терры. Однако в то злосчастное утро Посланница покинула нас! Исчезла с авгуров планеты! И поняли проповедники — Император гневится на нас — и велели миру слиться в молитве!"

traits.locale_text: "В день Звездного Погребения Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, должна была взойти на небесный престол, дабы забрать усопших к самому Бессмертному в священные чертоги Терры. traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "В день Звездного Погребения Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, должна была взойти на небесный престол, дабы забрать усопших к самому Бессмертному в священные чертоги Терры. traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"
languages.original_text: "В день Звездного Погребения Нолла, Огненная Посланница Императора, должна была взойти на небесный престол, дабы забрать усопших к самому Бессмертному в священные чертоги Терры. Однако в то злосчастное утро Посланница покинула нас! Исчезла с авгуров планеты! И поняли проповедники — Император гневится на нас — и велели миру слиться в молитве!"

languages.text: "Am Tag des himmlischen Begräbnisses sollte Nolla, der feurige Bote des Imperators, seinen himmlischen Thron besteigen und die Verstorbenen in die heiligen Kammern von Terra tragen, wo sie dem Unsterblichen dienen sollten. Doch an jenem traurigen Morgen ließ uns der Bote im Stich! Sie verschwand aus den Auguren des Planeten! Und so verkündeten die Prediger, wir hätten den Imperator erzürnt, und forderten die Welt auf, sich im Gebet zu vereinen!"
languages.original_text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"

languages.text: "Le jour de l'enterrement céleste, Nolla, le messager ardent de l'empereur, devait monter sur son trône céleste et transporter les défunts dans les chambres sacrées de Terra où ils serviraient l'Immortel. Mais en ce triste matin, la Messagère nous a abandonnés ! Elle disparut des augures de la planète ! C'est ainsi que les prédicateurs proclamèrent que nous avions déplu à l'Empereur et ordonnèrent au monde de s'unir dans la prière !"
languages.original_text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"

languages.text: "在天葬之日，诺拉，皇帝的火焰使者，本应登上天界的宝座，将逝者送入泰拉的圣殿，让他们在那里为不朽者服务。但在那个悲哀的早晨，使者抛弃了我们！她从地球的预言中消失了于是传教士们宣布 我们让皇帝陛下不高兴了 并命令全世界联合起来祈祷！"
languages.original_text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"

languages.text: "El día del Entierro Celestial, Nolla, el Mensajero Ardiente del Emperador, debía ascender a su trono celestial y llevar a los difuntos a las cámaras sagradas de Terra, donde servirían al Inmortal. Pero aquella triste mañana el Mensajero nos abandonó. ¡Desapareció de los augures del planeta! Y entonces los predicadores proclamaron que habíamos disgustado al Emperador y ordenaron al mundo que se uniera en oración".
languages.original_text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"

languages.text: 「天の埋葬の日、皇帝の炎の使者ノーラは天の玉座に昇り、死者をテラの聖なる部屋に運び、そこで不死の神に仕えるはずだった。しかし、その残念な朝、メッセンジャーは私たちを見捨てた！彼女は惑星のオーガーから姿を消した！そして説教者たちは、我々は皇帝の機嫌を損ねたと宣言し、世界中に祈りを捧げるよう命じたのだ！"
languages.original_text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"

languages.text: "Göksel Defin gününde İmparator'un Ateşli Elçisi Nolla, göksel tahtına yükselecek ve ölüyü Ölümsüz'e hizmet edecekleri Terra'nın kutsal odalarına taşıyacaktı. Ama o hüzünlü sabahta Haberci bizi terk etti! Gezegenin burçlarından kayboldu! Ve böylece vaizler İmparator'un hoşuna gitmediğimizi ilan ettiler ve dünyanın duada birleşmesini emrettiler!"
languages.original_text: "On the day of the Celestial Burial Nolla, Emperor's Fiery Messenger, was to ascend to its celestial throne and carry the deceased to the holy chambers of Terra where they would serve the Immortal. But on that rueful morning the Messenger abandoned us! She vanished from the planet's augurs! And so the preachers proclaimed we have displeased the Emperor and commanded the world to unite in prayer!"
